title: taraxacum radinum
intro: Taraxacum radinum, also known as the common dandelion, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family that is widely distributed across the globe. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum radinum include its ability to support liver function, improve digestion, and reduce blood pressure. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as tea, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to gastrointestinal problems.
